Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Xinxiangxiang Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Xinshexiang Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely absurd specimen of a 'Zhujiang Road universal grocery store cum decoration subcontractor.' The forensic engine has forcefully cleared the massive consumer electronics OEM system triggered by Apple Inc. in the underlying data. The official system blindly categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' solely based on 'Electronic Technology' in its name. However, the physical probe immediately punctured this industrial disguise: this is a micro-shop established in 2015, but with a paid-in capital of only 200,000 RMB and a 2024 insured headcount of '0 people.' The most fatal demotion strike comes from its geographical coordinates: 'No. 599 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' In Nanjing, Zhujiang Road is a highly famous computer and digital market district. In such a bustling retail street shop, employing 0 workers to manufacture electronic devices? This is a complete fantasy. Dissecting its 'Frankenstein'-like business license that is hundreds of words long, its business span is jaw-dropping: starting with 'construction engineering, interior decoration'; then cutting to 'computer retail, repair'; followed by a sudden shift into a hypermarket for 'clothing and bags, cosmetics, maternal and child products, toys and musical instruments, pet food'; and finally even selling 'agricultural products' and 'gifts and flowers.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; it is a 'Zero-Employee Universal Retail & Renovation Proxy located on Zhujiang Road.' The owner (Lei Xueqin) utilizes this shell not only to assemble computers and do interior decoration for people but also to act as a universal proxy buyer online or offline, capable of selling anything and issuing any invoice.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 72)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / MICRO UNIVERSAL RETAILER & RENOVATOR
